texto: Waves gently caress the sand as they glide along the shore. Sunlight fills the sky; rocks float along the water and make waves that glisten as they ripple. I’m supposed to be happy but I’m not, it’s raining, and only I can see it.... It’s raining, and only I can see it”Excerpt From: Daniel Sean Campbell. “Josh Harper and The Enemy of Destiny.
explicacao: Citação de Daniel Sean Campbell sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “Waves gently caress the sand as they glide along the shore.
